expectations.text: The response explains the -p (--print) flag for non-interactive/headless mode
expectations.evidence: Opens with: '--print (-p) flag that runs it in non-interactive (headless) mode. In this mode, Claude processes a single prompt, outputs the result to stdout, and exits.'

expectations.text: The response mentions --output-format for structured output (JSON/stream-json)
expectations.evidence: Mentions '--output-format json' in the flags table but does NOT mention 'stream-json' as an option. Only references 'json' format. The stream-json option is missing.

expectations.text: The response covers authentication via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section: 'Set the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable' with export example and GitHub Actions YAML.

expectations.text: The response provides a practical example of running claude in CI (e.g. a github actions snippet or shell command)
expectations.evidence: Full GitHub Actions workflow YAML with checkout, install, diff, claude -p invocation, and gh pr comment. Also shows piped CLI examples.
